lesson: Initial training must focus on fonts, structure, colour, table layout, and executive language style, not on reusing the sample paper's audit/data/AI content.

A default blank Word document is not enough for this EXP. The v1 blank paste rebuild lost bullet symbols, bullet indentation, and page flow. Preserve the learned Word style/numbering/table context, clear the body, then rebuild new content inside that context.

Do not rebuild the Audit Office metadata box as a normal grid table. It uses a source-specific rule-line layout with mostly borderless areas. Preserve and edit the source metadata table structure rather than drawing a new one.

Do not manually override body fonts when using this EXP. Manual font overrides caused inconsistent colours/fonts and awkward spacing. Use the learned Word paragraph styles directly and inspect PDF page renders before handover.

When editing merged Word table cells, do not clear apparent duplicate cells after writing. In the metadata table, duplicate cell references can point to the same merged value area and clearing them removes visible content.
